summary: SACU is a customs union where South Africa administers the common tariff schedule. All member countries apply the same tariff rates for external trade. The tariff book consists of Schedules 1-4 covering ordinary duties, excise duties, anti-dumping duties, and rebate items.

data_availability.note: All SACU members apply SARS tariff schedule

revenue_sharing.note: SACU agreement includes revenue pool sharing mechanism for customs and excise duties

next_steps: Download all SARS tariff schedules from SARS website
Extract all HS codes and applicable duty rates
Validate check digits for code accuracy
Note rebate item availability for eligible goods
notes: SACU is the oldest customs union in Africa (established 1910, reformed 2002). South Africa administers the common tariff for all 5 member states. SARS is the primary source for all tariff information. All schedules available as downloadable PDFs. ITAC handles tariff amendments and trade remedies investigations.
